use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HEART FAILURE WITH PRESERVED EJECTION FRACTION

TREATING CHRONIC HEART FAILURE WITH REDUCED EJECTION FRACTION IN PATIENTS NOT TAKING AN ACE INHIBITOR OR AN ARB OR PREVIOUSLY TAKING LOW DOSES OF THESE AGENTS, BY TITRATING UP FROM HALF THE USUALLY RECOMMENDED STARTING DOSE
